channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Renowned Photographer Raghu Rai Dies at 84, Leaving Behind a Legacy of Iconic Images
item.description: It’s with a heavy heart, yaar, that we’re hearing about the passing of Raghu Rai, one of India’s most celebrated photojournalists. He was 84. The man, a protégé of Henri Cartier-Bresson, really did se...

item.title: How constant global crises are shaping anxiety in Australia
item.description: Australians are experiencing rising levels of anxiety, particularly young people, amid ongoing global and economic uncertainty. Students like Tiffany report feeling anxious almost daily due to the con...

item.title: Cup of Joe and VXON to hold Gen Z Live concert in Bacolod this July
item.description: OPM acts Cup of Joe and VXON are set to bring their music to Bacolod City through the upcoming ‘Gen Z Live’ concert scheduled this July. The event is positioned as a youth-centered live music experien...

item.title: Colorado Updates Age-Verification Bill with Exemptions for Open-Source Software
item.description: Colorado's age-verification bill, which originally targeted operating systems and app stores, now includes significant exemptions for open-source software. The updated bill, which passed through the H...

item.title: Nwifuru Promises No Candidate Imposition, Declares Support for Tinubu Ahead of 2027
item.description: Ebonyi State Governor, Francis Nwifuru, don talk say him no go force any candidate on the people of the state as Nigeria dey prepare for the 2027 general elections. According to statement wey him Chie...

item.title: FM Sitharaman links high voter turnout in Bengal and Tamil Nadu to potential political shift
item.description: Union Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman has observed that the unusually high voter turnout in West Bengal and Tamil Nadu may signal anti-incumbency sentiment and potential political change. Speaking...

item.title: Trump and Melania Evacuated from White House Correspondents' Dinner Following Shooting Incident
item.description: On the evening of Saturday, 25 April 2026, the White House Correspondents' Dinner at the Washington Hilton was thrown into chaos when a gunman opened fire near the main security screening area. Presid...

item.title: Advocates Rally in Pasay to Support Proposed Autism Inclusion Legislation
item.description: Libo-libong advocates, kabilang ang mga indibidwal sa autism community, mga pamilya, at iba’t ibang organisasyon, ang nagtipon sa Pasay City upang ipanawagan ang pagpasa ng isang mahalagang batas na m...

item.title: US President Trump and First Lady Safe After Shooting Incident at White House Event
item.description: On Saturday night, US President Donald Trump and First Lady Melania Trump were quickly evacuated from the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner after a man armed with a shotgun attempted to b...

item.title: President Zardari visits China to strengthen economic ties and advance CPEC cooperation
item.description: President Asif Ali Zardari has commenced an official visit to China aimed at strengthening bilateral relations, particularly in economic and trade sectors, with a strong emphasis on the China-Pakistan...

item.title: Pat Cummins makes successful comeback in IPL despite facing off with teen sensation Vaibav Suryavanshi
item.description: Pat Cummins made a successful return to cricket in the Indian Premier League (IPL), helping Sunrisers Hyderabad secure a victory despite being tested by India's teenage cricket sensation Vaibav Suryav...

item.title: White House Correspondents’ Dinner Disrupted by Gunshot Scare, Trump Evacuated
item.description: Chaos erupted at the annual White House Correspondents' Dinner on Saturday night when reports of gunshots sent attendees, including U.S. President Donald Trump and other senior officials, scrambling f...

item.title: Trump evacuated from White House correspondents dinner during security scare
item.description: A video surfaced showing U.S. President Donald Trump being rushed out of the White House Correspondents' Dinner following a security incident. Trump later confirmed that he was safe, but the event spa...

item.title: Donated SUVs linked to ANCWL president moved to party headquarters amid internal probe calls
item.description: Two luxury Chinese-made SUVs linked to ANC Women’s League (ANCWL) president Sisisi Tolashe have surfaced at Luthuli House, the ANC’s headquarters in Johannesburg, sparking further scrutiny around thei...

item.title: Mangan Taku festival highlights diverse Cordillera food traditions and local communities
item.description: The Mangan Taku Cordillera Food Fair in Baguio City highlights the rich and diverse culinary heritage of the Cordillera region, going beyond the commonly known dish pinikpikan. Now in its seventh year...

item.title: City Power taken to court over unpaid diesel supply amid mounting debt concerns
item.description: Johannesburg’s municipal electricity utility, City Power, is facing legal action from diesel supplier African Rhino Fuels (ARF), which alleges breach of contract and non-payment for fuel delivered in ...

item.title: White House Correspondents' Dinner Resumes After Incident, Triggers Mixed Reactions
item.description: The annual White House Correspondents’ Dinner was thrown into disarray on Saturday night after shots rang out, prompting a frantic scramble for cover amongst attendees. President Donald Trump and othe...

item.title: San Francisco Giants Sell Minority Stake to Thrive Capital
item.description: The San Francisco Giants have sold a minority stake of the team to Thrive Capital, a venture capital firm owned by Joshua Kushner, the brother of Jared Kushner. The deal, announced on April 24, 2026, ...

item.title: Donald Trump escorted from White House Correspondents' Dinner after false alarm
item.description: During the White House Correspondents' Dinner, former President Donald Trump was quickly escorted from the venue by Secret Service agents after sounds resembling gunshots were reported. The incident c...

item.title: South Africa's Struggles with AI Policy and Factual Accuracy
item.description: The South African government has been racing to create a policy regulating the use of artificial intelligence (AI). In an attempt to meet tight deadlines, officials in the department of communication ...
